top_signals.title: UBS' Khan on China Business, AI Impact and Middle East (Full Interview)
top_signals.summary: UBS Group AG’s Asia Pacific President Iqbal Khan discusses the China market, potential impact of AI on jobs and how the bank is navigating geopolitical turmoil. He speaks with Bloomberg's Stephen Engle in Hong Kong. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Base Metals Advance as US Touts Progress Toward Iran Peace Deal
top_signals.summary: Copper climbed and aluminum was on track for its highest close in four years on cautious optimism that the US and Iran could reach a peace deal, despite a fresh flare-up of hostilities in the Persian Gulf.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Vulnerable bank customers could face ‘higher barriers’ to redress in Treasury overhaul
top_signals.summary: Warnings are being raised over a planned Treasury shake-up of financial services rules after an impact assessment revealed vulnerable customers could be excluded from receiving compensation when wronged. The government unveiled its Enhancing Financial Services Bill at the King’s Speech, which paved the way for reform to consumer redress protections through changes in the Consumer Credit [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board requests public comment on a proposal to establish a "payment account," which legally eligible financial institutions could use for the specific purpose of clearing and settling their payments
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board requests public comment on a proposal to establish a "payment account," which legally eligible financial institutions could use for the specific purpose of clearing and settling their payments
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: SpaceX nears lift-off
top_signals.summary: An IPO so big it could change the Nasdaq

top_signals.title: India's GIFT City offers gateway for investors seeking global stocks
Former U.S. cybersecurity chief urges IT reform in Japan
top_signals.summary: Systems that have been deployed in Japan for 20-30 years have "many weaknesses," says Chris Inglis, the first U.S. national cyber director.

top_signals.title: Arca gets $1.4M funding to advance carbon tech from lab to field deployment
top_signals.summary: Arca’s technology is the first field‑scale system to accelerate carbon mineralization in mine waste.
